positive: Minimalist geometric celestial map, featuring stylized, interconnected constellations and abstract nebula swirls in deep indigo, matte gold, and ethereal teal. The composition should be highly symmetrical, presenting clean, strong silhouettes of zodiac figures and cosmic pathways against a solid, textured dark background. Use bold linework, inspired by celestial navigation charts and ancient astronomical drawings, creating a sense of wonder and deep space. The design must be flat, high-contrast, and scalable for direct apparel printing, evoking a modern, timeless aesthetic. Highly detailed, vector art style, 4K quality, centered.
